column4: App Entry score increase starting on 11/15
column11: I analyzed the App entry score trends over the past four months and found a minor decline from mid-November through December, likely attributed to holiday traffic patterns. The score has since returned to normal levels and currently stands at 97.63%. No specific software issues were identified that contributed to the temporary decline.

column4: Location/v2 returns BTM as False for Map-T IP's
column11: I've learned from PINXT that all requests are now being routed through PINXT, and the source port is being included in all requests. We haven't seen any escalations on this issue for a while. Closing this ticket as the issue appears to be resolved.
column16: Architects and DEV are working on the side to remove the logic(MAP-T flag should not be used for any decision making and always pass on the IP address and source port in the request) on PINXT Video Gateway/PILITE. It seems like we're good to close this ticket now. Please let me know if you see any SCI's with this issue.

column4: STVA - Roku - Device auto logging in and displays 'Service Unavailable' Error
column11:
LRM returned apps (YouTube, Netflix, and VodHunt) to IPVS for non-video accounts, with the VodHunt app having TMSID "0". IPVS uses logic that checks if TMSID has online flag "Y" and service status "Launched" to set the watch live capability to "True".

In this case, Netflix and YouTube had online flag "N", but TMSID "0" was mapped to an old FOX channel with online flag "Y" and service status "Launched". Hardik consulted with the Product team and updated the old Fox channel service status to "Deactivated". Now IPVS doesn't recognize any channels through its logic and sets "WatchLive" to "False", which resolved the issue.
column16:
LRM returned apps (YouTube, Netflix, and VodHunt) to IPVS for non-video accounts, with the VodHunt app having TMSID "0". IPVS uses logic that checks if TMSID has online flag "Y" and service status "Launched" to set the watch live capability to "True".

In this case, Netflix and YouTube had online flag "N", but TMSID "0" was mapped to an old FOX channel with online flag "Y" and service status "Launched". Hardik consulted with the Product team and updated the old Fox channel service status to "Deactivated". Now IPVS doesn't recognize any channels through its logic and sets "WatchLive" to "False", which resolved the issue.

column4: buyFlowEntitlementPackageV5 api decrease in success rate on 2/18
column11:
Soma, Achyuth added a comment - Feb 19, 2026 1:43 PM
The issue originated post-deployment of CSS/ATTOS/SOM/LUI 9.1.3 Production Release. BuyFlow Middle errors began at 12 AM MST on 02/18 due to missing "Level of Service" in the attos-api/v2/session/account response and CSS failing to return TV Addon Offers for existing video accounts.

The CSS Dev team found that missing package code administration was the root cause. The fix (MER-35475) was deployed to production last night, and error rates have since declined.

column4: cDVR api response time increase and tune time detraction 1/8
column11: The CDVR performance issue between 5:00-8:10 PM MDT was caused by uneven traffic distribution where 3-5 pods out of 10+ handled disproportionate load during peak hours, leading to high CPU usage that triggered HPA auto-scaling attempts at 5PM, 6PM, and 8PM (initially failing due to resource constraints but eventually succeeding). The only atypical configuration was that the Blue cluster remained at production scale levels throughout the incident instead of passive levels, and was downscaled the following day. Juan (Dev) is investigating the uneven pod distribution pattern, which has been observed historically despite round-robin load balancing configuration, while Salberg (IPVC) continues working on optimization solutions.
column16: The CDVR performance issue between 5:00-8:10 PM MDT was caused by uneven traffic distribution where 3-5 pods out of 10+ handled disproportionate load during peak hours, leading to high CPU usage that triggered HPA auto-scaling attempts at 5PM, 6PM, and 8PM (initially failing due to resource constraints but eventually succeeding). The only atypical configuration was that the Blue cluster remained at production scale levels throughout the incident instead of passive levels, and was downscaled the following day. Juan (Dev) is investigating the uneven pod distribution pattern, which has been observed historically despite round-robin load balancing configuration, while Salberg (IPVC) continues working on optimization solutions.

column4: Xumo - ES1 - STVA - Startup channel not working
column11: The startup channel behavior on Xumo differs from other clients (Samsung TV, Roku). On Xumo, exiting the app via the UI (Exit button → "Yes" confirmation) only backgrounds the application and launches it on the last viewed channel. According to the development team, the app is only completely terminated during nightly reboots or user signout. Both pressing the Xumo remote "Home" button and exiting via the UI (Exit button → "Yes" confirmation) result in backgrounding the app.
column16: The startup channel behavior on Xumo differs from other clients (Samsung TV, Roku). On Xumo, exiting the app via the UI (Exit button → "Yes" confirmation) only backgrounds the application and launches it on the last viewed channel. According to the development team, the app is only completely terminated during nightly reboots or user signout. Both pressing the Xumo remote "Home" button and exiting via the UI (Exit button → "Yes" confirmation) result in backgrounding the app.

column11:
There appeared to be impact to Linear and PLTV as well. PLTV issues subsided quickly, but Linear/CDVR remained elevated until approximately 23:00. I found three INCs for playback failures during this time.

INC000036248713 was for CDVR out of Peakview and was opened and closed as a software bug on the cDVR packager (VMWARE host: PVDCCO-CDVR-SY-SRM-1018.SPECTRUM.COM). It’s unclear whether this device is related to the ongoing CAAS issue bug we’ve seen in the past. I don’t see a clear for that incident from Vitria until 22:00.

IPVD is not aware of any root cause on their side, and there is no definitive INC/CHG identified as the cause, but it is likely related to the above incident.

The other two were closed with Issue Self Cleared and No Trouble Found. 
-INC000036248713 : cDVR Play Incident - Failing Streams. INC opened and closed with software bug on cDVR packager, (VMWARE) PVDCCO-CDVR-SY-SRM-1018.SPECTRUM.COM.
-INC000036245202 : Eastern NC | STVA Watch Incident | Steam INIT Failures. Closed as No Trouble Found
-INC000036242475 : National | Multiple Services | STVA Stream Init Incident. Closed with Issue Self Resolved

column4: Invincible Wifi Customer unable to access local channel
column11:
What is Invincible WiFi?

Invincible WiFi is a Spectrum business internet solution that includes a WiFi 7 router with 5G cellular backup and a battery backup unit. When the primary internet connection goes down, it automatically fails over to 5G cellular to maintain connectivity. It is designed for Spectrum's Mid-Market and Large Business Enterprise customers.

Does the network switch change the IP?

Yes. When the network fails over to the 5G cellular backup, the public IP changes from a Spectrum-assigned IP to a cellular carrier IP (e.g., Verizon). This means the IP is no longer recognized as in-home by our location services.

Are in-home channels streamable after the network switches?

Not currently. When the device switches to cellular backup, the location service returns "Behind the Modem" as false to IPVS, which blocks in-home-only channel streams. Executives are in discussions with legal on this, and SDIT has been asked to explore a reliable way to detect when a user is connected to the Invincible WiFi 7 router so that in-home access can be granted in a future update.

column4: Apple Player Freeze Frame At Live Edge For In Progress Recording
column11:
When an attempt to playback a recording that is still live on Apple TV it will show a brief freeze shot of the live edge before playing back from the beginning. In some instances this is not ideal as it may show the score of a game.  
This has existed since the launch of cDVR on AppleTV and is a limitation of Apple’s player within progress assets.  Created STVFUJI-10761 ticket to file an enhancement request with Apple.
